text: Bo, bishop, bo-bo-bo Cat, c-c-cat, tea-sir-dog, d-d-dog-d-b-d-w-b-b-b-b-b-A-A-O-B-B-B-O-G-buck. Good job, baby. C-K-K-G. Wyatt. W-W-What. Wyatt. M-H-Monkey. Nose, L-L-Nose. Under-bus, pig, p-p-pig. S4, sun, sun, sun, sun, t-four, tiger. T-t-tiger. Are you picking your boogies? What are you doing? You silly. Yuck, yuck, yuck, z-z-z-z-z-u-u-u-u-u-z-bra. Z-Z-Z breath. Good job, baby. I did it. You did it.
